notes_observed: Page only compares 3 mattresses (Ultima Memory Foam / Original / Hybrid Latex) — not all 10. Useful for layer/height validation. Note: schema captured starting_price_inr but Original=5593 differs from product page (5714 Single); use product page as authoritative.

layers: Middle 2: High Density Foam with DeepTouch™ Pressure (4-6 inches)
Bottom: Super High Density Foam (1.5 inches)
comparison_table.best_for: All sleepers; specially side and stomach sleepers wanting cooler rest and pressure relief

layers: Bottom: Super High Density Foam (2-8 inches; varies by total height)
Top: Pinhole Tech Latex Foam (1 inch)

validation_findings: Original Mattress comes in 5 height options (4/5/6/8/10 inch) — product page only showed 6" SKUs. Bottom foam thickness varies 2-8" to match total height.
Ultima Memory Foam has 4 layers (not 3 as some pages suggest); 4-6" HD foam layer changes by total height.
Hybrid Latex 6" SKU available (product page only showed 8" as og:price).
